channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole, 16th March
item.description:
On hewlett road heading towards a40 just before the Eldon Rd turn.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145, Hewlett Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 16th March
item.description:
I hit a 100mm deep pothole at around 11:00am 13/03/26 and it has written my car off. I could not report at the time as no signal.e
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car park near medical centre at Six Ways, A40, Charlton Kings, 16th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ryeworth Road, Cheltenham

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 16th March
item.description:
2 hour make safe Give and take please make site safe with x 4 barriers and x8 sandbags (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple flags attached to street furniture, 16th March
item.description:
New Barn Lane/Swindon Road - Directly outside race course - Multiple flags attached to street furniture
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Barn Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsafe road surface, 16th March
item.description:
The entire left side of the road heading towards Tommy Taylors is covered in deep & wide potholes. This has been ongoing for months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Series of potholes, 16th March
item.description:
This series of potholes on the southbound Lane of the A417 in the endlessly ongoing roadworks has been present and unrepaired for at least 3 months now. Have you ever thought of inspecting the roads for which you are responsible on a regular and frequent basis? Ignoring this worsening issue is negligent and will result in legal action being taken if/ when vehicles suffer damage and it isn't resurfaced urgently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Cowley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes you could park a car in . If I fell in I wouldn't be able to climb out. My car has to be fit for roads but roads are never fit for cars, 15th March
item.description:
Theres loads all down the road. You have to drive into parked cars or houses to avoid them because crashing into cars or houses will cause less damage than the potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Bethesda Street, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 15th March
item.description:
Outside number 83.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Warden Hill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
